SeguroTools

Knowledge Base

A source-linked index connecting consumer pain points to official insurance education material.

Insurance Terms and Policy Basics

Plain-language definitions for premiums, deductibles, limits, exclusions, riders, claims, and beneficiaries.

1 sources518 pain signals

Life Insurance Needs and Policy Types

Life insurance need estimates, term/whole/universal differences, beneficiaries, death benefits, and policy locator workflows.

1 sources87 pain signals

Final Expense and Funeral Planning

Funeral price rights, burial/cremation cost components, prepaid funeral plans, and final expense coverage framing.

2 sources1 pain signals

ACA Marketplace and Health Insurance Costs

Marketplace eligibility, premiums, cost-sharing reductions, premium tax credits, self-employed coverage, and plan categories.

2 sources62 pain signals

Immigrant and DACA Health Coverage

Marketplace eligibility by immigration status, mixed-status family applications, community health alternatives, and policy-date caveats.

2 sources27 pain signals

Medicare Basics and Plan Choices

Medicare Parts A/B/C/D, Medigap, enrollment timing, costs, plan choice, fraud protection, and Spanish-language access.

3 sources41 pain signals

Auto Insurance Coverage and Cost Factors

Liability, collision, comprehensive, uninsured motorist, deductibles, rating factors, telematics, and gig-use coverage gaps.

2 sources55 pain signals

Homeowners, Renters, and Flood Insurance

Dwelling coverage, personal property, liability, additional living expenses, flood exclusions, FEMA flood risk, and escrow basics.

4 sources97 pain signals

Pet Insurance

Accident-only, accident and illness, wellness coverage, pre-existing conditions, reimbursement, waiting periods, and age limits.

1 sources41 pain signals

Disability Insurance and Income Protection

Short-term vs long-term disability, workers' compensation differences, benefit periods, elimination periods, and evidence requirements.

1 sources55 pain signals

Small Business Insurance and Liability

General liability, professional liability, product liability, workers' compensation, commercial property, and home-based business gaps.

1 sources15 pain signals

Gig Worker and Sharing Economy Insurance

Personal vs commercial auto gaps, rideshare periods, delivery exclusions, self-employed health coverage, and liability needs.

1 sources10 pain signals

Insurance Scams and Fraud Prevention

Health insurance scams, Medicare impersonation, fake discount plans, lead-generation risks, and official reporting paths.

2 sources17 pain signals

Claims, Denials, and Complaints

Claim documentation, delays, denials, complaint preparation, state Department of Insurance escalation, and carrier complaint research.

2 sources56 pain signals

SeguroTools

Insurance calculators and plain-English guides for U.S. households.

Educational estimate only. This site does not sell insurance, negotiate coverage, or provide legal, tax, financial, or insurance advice.
